title: Le président
writer: Georges Simenon, Michel Audiard, Henri Verneuil
actors: Jean Gabin, Bernard Blier, Renée Faure
plot: At 73, France's ex-president, Emile Beaufort, faces declining health, but he still plays a vigorous role behind the scenes as a philosopher and, potentially, as a power broker. In particular, his relationship with Philippe Chalamo...
